titleStmt.title: SII 35.74: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 74. (A.R. No. 81 of 1952-53.) BYĀHAṬṬI, HUBLI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the Tōṭadappana maṭha.
This badly damaged record is dated Śaka 1157, Manmatha, Śrāvaṇa ba. Amāvāsya, solar eclipse. The details correspond to A.D. 1235, August 15, Wednesday.

Records a gift of land to the Gaṅgādhara-bhaṭṭa, Harihara-bhaṭṭa, Nākaṇa-bhaṭṭa, Kallibhaṭṭa, Yisvara-bhaṭṭa, Maneyadhara-bhaṭṭa, Kēsava-bhaṭṭa, Aditya-bhaṭṭa, Pavadēva-bhaṭṭa, Bhāskarabhaṭṭa, Māyidēva-bhaṭṭa, Vāmana-bhaṭṭa Vāmana-paṇḍita, Mādhava-bhaṭṭa, Rāya-bhaṭṭa, Bhaṭṭōpādhya, Purushōtama-bhaṭṭa, Māyidēva-bhaṭṭa for the prosperity of the king's rule and their own family by Ponna-Bommiseṭṭi and Chauḍiseṭṭi, when Mahāsāmantādhipati Mahāpradhāna Mahāmātya Malliseṭṭi was governing Beḷovla Three Hundred, Puligere Three Hundred and Banavāsi Twelve Thousand. The gift was entrusted to the Mahājanas of Bērpaṭṭi, whose virtues are described.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ dvārāvatīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ śrī
dharaṁ yādavakuḷakamaḷakaḷikāvikāsabhāskara maṁ
ya salise late lāḷarāU saledācā¨ryya
yanāma
¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire .
tā¨rtthijana laya ka¨rṇna
rārājipariṁtu śiṁdare siṁghaṇarāya
yiḷe
śiṣṭa mahā sāmaṁtādhipati mahāpradhānaṁ śrīmadā¨ryya malliseṭṭiyaru beḷvola mū
nūṟu huligeṟemūnūṟu banavasepaṁnitsāsiramumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyutta
mire . Ātana saccaritraveṁtene . surapatigā brehaspati lasadvita sūnuge bhā¨rggavaṁ divaranimapati matsara
bhuviṁge yugaṁdhara maṁtriyaṁte taṁ narapati siṁghaṇaṁge negaḷdāriyamallane maṁtriyāgi
dana rājya vibhavōnnatiyaṁ nijamaṁtraśaktiyiṁ . Ātana tanayari¨rbbaru jāta dēśaṁgaḷa Adinādi
khyāta guṇa hoṁnabaṁmaṁ bhūtaḷanutanā¨ryyaboṁma dhanajaḷanāmāḷdaru . samudayaṁ pālidataraṁ śrīmaprā
mareṁdāśipa dvijatva rakṣada pū¨rvvadattiyanu tāṁkadi¨rppa dhammaṁgaḷaṁ sājata ghūṁ¨rṇnise māḷpa tākiraḷidā
dimappanaṁgaja rūpaṁ guṇa hoṁnaboṁmmanuru kī¨rttiśrī maṁdaraṁ vallabhaṁ . nayaṁ viprajanā trigaḷanatyu
na bhūtaḷamellaṁ pogaḷvaṁdadiṁ vipuḷa dānaṁ pūjeyaṁ māḷpa dō¨rvvaladi haṁdi jaḷā pēḷavana
ji viḷasadbhūtaḷadalliyā¨ryya camuṁḍaṁ gōtrātaḷaṁ baṇnisalu . bijeyā¨ryya maṁtrija sūnu rasō
tānāgaḷbhujabaḷaṁ bē¨rppaṭṭiya sadvija¨rggittaṁ camuṁḍaneseye bahuvrittigaḷaṁ . Ātanagrajaṁ . karayesege
ḷuru mudadiṁ dhāreyeṟedu bē¨rppaṭṭiya bhāsura viprajanake koṭṭaṁ varaguṇanidhi koṁnaboṁmaṁ .
Avarāḷva nāḍiṁge cūḍāmaṇiyenisida rājadhāni bē¨rppaṭṭiya guṇava¨rṇnanaveṁtane . baḷasi¨rdda naṁdanavanadiṁ
ppa keṟegaḷiṁ grihā yiṁdagaḷiṁ kōṭeyōḷbē¨rppaṭṭi dhare pogaḷaluṁ doreyē . surabhiyaniḷisuvahaṁ
rinalaṟuvattokkalaṁ paṁcamaṭhōtkaredira siṁgagatoṁḍa mudadiṁde nripōttamariṁ . Alliya
stajarabaḷavejaṁtamā sālinoḷippurusa kaḷā kaḷālaḷita guṇāḍhyara bhṛtsōmaḷa bhaktaru . yamaniyama
dhyānavagnihōtraṁ yajñaṁ tamagesadire māḍida¨rssavāne Ā dha¨rmmamenisidā . yoḷesakaṁ .
doḷu śakava¨rṣaṁ 1157 neya manumathasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa bahuḷadamāvāse
sū¨ryyagrahaṇadaṁdu hoṁnaboṁmiseṭṭiyaruṁ cavuḍiseṭṭiyaruṁ siṁghaṇadēva rājyābhyudayā¨rtthamāgi ya
¨ryyādeyā¨rtthamāgiyuṁ bē¨rppaṭṭiya mahājanaṁgaḷa gṛhakṣētraṁgaḷaṁ sa¨rvvanama
trakke cavuḍikā ṁgaḷa sīmeyeṁteṁdaḍe dāriyiṁ paḍuvalu
baḍagalu cala mūḍageṟeyiṁ teṁkalu
bhumareyoḷage 48 gēṇa kōlalu prathama sthaḷadali śa
ge vritti 10 matta 2 Alliṁ paḍuvalu haritagōtrada sōmadēvabhaṭṭa
bhaṭṭōpādhyāya¨rgge ma 2 viśvāmitragōtrada śa
rabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 1 Alliṁ baḍagalu vaśiṣṭagōtrada sōmadēva
śāṁḍilyagōtrada
lu viśvāmitragōtrada brahmadēvabhaṭṭa
da kṛṣṇaṁbhaṭṭa¨rgge maḷavanu
kāśyapagōtrada bā
śaṁkaraghaisarige ka 2 bāḷa
gōtrada bubayyaṁgaḷige
ge 2 kāśyapa gōtrada
bēhaṭṭiya mahājanaṁ para
bhāradvājagōtrada jannabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 6 bhāradvā
bhaṭṭa¨rgge da purāṇada mādēva
dēvabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 2 bhāradvājagōtrada boppe sthaḷadalli vaśiṣṭagōtrada gōpa
raṁge ma 2 vaśiṣṭagōtrada boppe
ralliṁ vidurama bhāradvājagōtrada bhāraṇnaṁgaḷige ma 1 Ātrēyagōtrada hiriyaṇnaṁgaḷge ma 2 kāśyapagōtrada ma 4 A
ma 2 Ā gaṁgādharabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 2 Ā hariharabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 2 jaṁnadabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 2 māpagoraḷa śaṁkarabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 2 vīrabhaṭṭa
ttar 2 bhāradvāja gōtrada parada sūrayyaṁgaḷge ma 2 haritagōtrada puruṣōttamabhaṭṭagge ma 2 Eraḍaneya sthaḷadalli prakave
vā sagōtrakke satrakke ma 4 nākaṇabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 2 kallibhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 2 bhāradvājagōtrada paddayaṁge ma 4 kaṁbave
yaṁge ma 2 khaṁḍikakke ma 2 Ātrēyagōtra brahmadēvage ma 4 Eṁṭaneya sthaḷadalli prathama kaṇva gōtrada śivadēvappaṁgaḷge
ma 2 kāśyapagōtrada dhanēśvararupādhyāya¨rgge ma 4 kāśyapagōtrada kallibhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 2 vatsagōtrada U
mēśvarabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 4 gautamagōtrada mallarasa¨rgge ma 1 bhaṭṭavrittige ma 2 voṁbhattaneya sthaḷadalli kāśyapa
gōtrada taṁtramaṁtradācā¨ryya viṭhayyaṁge ma 4 kāśyapagōtrada māyidharabhaṭṭagge ma 4 bhāradvājagōtrada kēśava
bhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 2 kāśyapagōtrada Ādityabhaṭṭōpādhyāya¨rgge ma 2 kaṇvagōtrada śivadēvabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 2 kāśyapagōtra
da bhāskarabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 6 kāmadēvāyanagōtrada māyidēvabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 2 kāśyapagōtrada huligeṟeya mayyaṁ
gaḷge ma 2 siripayyaṁge ma 2 hattaneya sthaḷadalli bhaṭṭarige ma 4 kāśyapagōtrada vāmanabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 4
kāśyapagōtrada gōpāḷadāsa¨rgge ma 4 vāmanapaṁḍita¨rgge ma 2 Āhita viśvāmitragōtrada huḍige sōmaṇnaṁgaḷge ma 4
kāśyapagōtrada mādhavabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 2 vaśiṣṭagōtra dēvaṇnayyaṁgaḷge ma 2 haṁnoṁ
daneya sthaḷadalli bhāradvājagōtrada rāyabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 2 bhāradvājagōtrada mū¨rttināraṇnaṁgaḷge ma 2 śāṁḍilyagōtrada vā
manamū¨rttigaḷge ma 6 vaśiṣṭagōtrada yajñēśvarabhaṭṭōpādhyāya¨rgge ma 4 yāṟaneya sthaḷadali puruśōttamabhaṭṭarige daṁpama
vāṟu kāśyapagōtrada māyidēvabhaṭṭa¨rgge ma 1 Eṁṭaneya sthaḷadali
lōkēśvaradiṁ baḍaga nūrumaṁ mūḍalu kōśikagōtrada gōvāse cavuḍaṇnaṁgaḷa maga © svasti śrīmatu yā
davanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷapratāpa cakrava¨rtti śrīsiṁghaṇadēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhi prava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatā
raṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi yāriya malliseṭṭiyara mamaṁ yalagulinātana sa¨rvadhikāri
seṭṭiyara besadiṁ suṁkave dhareyoḷarasaru śrīmatu bēhaṭṭiya sa¨rvvanamasyada brahmapuriya
hājanaṁgaḷige hēṟondu nalasaṁvatsarada puśya bahuḷadamāvāseyādivāra byatīpāta
bara Aliya¨rddōdayadalu Amedayanaṁgaṁge suṁka 4 nu sa¨rvvanamaśyavāgi dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi
biṭṭaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭa¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 35.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
